text:
om enemies and evil spirits, diseases of the anus, long life and
wealth. In the 7th he makes one reduced to penury owing to
his intrigues with women, lose his wife and virility, self-willed
and silly. In the Bth he makes the person short-lived, commit
impure or sinful acts, have a defective limb, suffer from wind-
disease and have very few children. In the 9th he makes one
contradict everybody, without religious merits, and leader of a
community, village or town. In the JOth he makes the native
famous, have few children, engaged in others' activities, fearless
and devoid of meritorious acts. In the 11 th he makes one
prosperous, have few children, long-lived and suffer from ear-
disease. In the 12th he makes one commit sins secretly, a spend-
thrift, and suffer from water-disease (or have trouble from water
and diseases).
Ketu occupying the 1st house at birth makes one ungrateful,
unhappy, a tale-bearer, shameless, fallen from his position,
